english: He who joyfully holds sweet modaka in his hand, who always leads to liberation
roman: Muda karata modakam sada vimukti sadakam

english: Who wears the crescent moon as an ornament, who joyfully protects the world
roman: Kala dharava tamsaka vilasi loka rakshakam

english: The sole leader of the leaderless, who destroyed the elephant demon
Who instantly destroys inauspiciousness for those who bow — I bow to that Vinayaka
Extremely fearsome to those who do not bow, radiant as the newly risen sun
roman: Nate tara atibhikaram navodita arka bhasvaram

english: Who reduces to nothing the enemies of those who bow, who lifts the devotees from great calamity
Lord of gods, lord of treasures, lord of elephants, lord of Ganas
The great Lord, supreme of the supreme — I take continuous shelter in him
roman: Maheshvaram tam ashraye param param nirantaram

english: These five gems of Ganesha — whoever recites daily with reverence
Reciting at dawn while remembering Ganesha in the heart
roman: Prajalp ati prabhatakahe hridi smaran Ganeshvaram

english: Attains freedom from disease, freedom from fault, good learning, good progeny
And soon attains long life and all eight forms of prosperity
roman: Samahitayur ashta bhutim abhy upaiti so achirat
